summary: Contact Merge Tool feature fully tested. All 13 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend duplicates page loads correctly with duplicate sets, merge buttons, activity stats, and proper UX. The feature correctly detects duplicate contacts by normalized phone number (last 10 digits) within the same user_id and provides merge functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: contact_merge.py: Good implementation - normalizes phone to last 10 digits, properly validates user ownership before merge, migrates data across 15+ collections
Validation checks are comprehensive: self-merge, cross-user merge, already merged contacts all properly rejected
Frontend duplicates.tsx: Clean UI with proper data-testid attributes, shows activity counts to help user decide which to keep as primary

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Page loads, displays duplicate sets, merge buttons visible

seed_data_creation: Existing test data used: phone 5551234567 (API Test + Todd Berry), phone 5551112222 (3 TEST Idempotent leads), phone 2387460571 (TEST Phone Format pair)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact Merge feature is fully functional. GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/duplicates returns duplicate sets grouped by normalized phone (last 10 digits). POST /api/contacts/{user_id}/merge migrates data from duplicate to primary and soft-deletes duplicate with status='merged'. Frontend at /contacts/duplicates shows duplicate sets with merge buttons. The 'Most Active' contact is suggested as primary. Merge button uses showConfirm (native alert) for confirmation.

features_verified.detect_duplicates_by_phone: PASS - Returns contacts grouped by last 10 digits of phone within same user_id
features_verified.duplicate_set_structure: PASS - Each set has phone, contacts array with enrichment (event_count, conversation_count, card_count)
features_verified.contacts_sorted_by_activity: PASS - Most active contact listed first as suggested primary
features_verified.merge_validation_cross_user: PASS - Rejects contacts belonging to different user with 404
features_verified.merge_validation_invalid_id: PASS - Rejects invalid ObjectId format with 400
features_verified.merge_execution: PASS - Successfully merges and returns records_migrated count
features_verified.merge_idempotency: PASS - Re-merge of already merged contact rejected with 400
features_verified.frontend_page_load: PASS - /contacts/duplicates loads with title, subtitle, refresh button
features_verified.frontend_duplicate_display: PASS - Shows phone numbers, contact names, activity stats, tags
features_verified.frontend_merge_buttons: PASS - 'Merge into {name}' buttons visible for each duplicate
